success_condition: A first-customer onboarding template exists for controlled pilot intake, customer data collection, forbidden claims, test questions, and GO/HOLD/NO-GO review.
stop_condition: Stop if runtime code, pricing page changes, public page changes, paid provider activation, or customer private data is required.
next_action: Create a documentation template only. Keep it evidence-gated and pilot-focused.
note: Customer onboarding template merged to efro main.

success_condition: A repeatable evidence sheet exists for recording first-pilot questions, answer quality, missing data, screenshots, and final GO/HOLD/NO-GO decision.
stop_condition: Stop if runtime code, pricing page changes, public page changes, paid provider activation, or customer private data is required.
next_action: Create a documentation evidence sheet only. No customer data.
note: First pilot evidence sheet merged to efro main.

success_condition: A read-only landingpage rewrite plan exists with SAFE/HOLD/NO-GO messaging, section order, CTA direction, and claim boundaries.
stop_condition: Stop if public page editing, pricing editing, billing activation, or unsupported claims are required.

note: Read-only landingpage rewrite plan merged to efro main. No public page edit.

success_condition: A Shopify live smoke plan exists for owner-authorized dev-shop testing without secrets, billing claims, or code changes.

note: Shopify live smoke plan merged to efro-shopify main. No runtime or credential change.

stop_condition: Stop if broader redesign, pricing edits, billing claims, Shopify approval claims, new components, package changes, API changes, or deploy are required.
next_action: Prepare a minimal patch for src/app/page.tsx only: hero headline, subheadline, trust pills, and CTA wording. Do not edit pricing or runtime behavior.
